text:
Update vm from 8.0.12 to 8.0.14.

Notes:
 - new upstream maintainer
 - new upstream site - launchpad.net
 - 8.0.13 fixed broken VM-Cache entries and spurious iso-2022-jp encodign
 - 8.0.14 fixed an xemacs incompatibility
